differences.justification: New module using langchain4j core types as public API - these are external dependency types, not this module's own API surface
Added doSample parameter to ZhipuAiChatModel and ZhipuAiStreamingChatModel constructors as part of ZhipuAiChatRequestParameters integration
defaultRequestParameters() return type changed from ChatRequestParameters to ZhipuAiChatRequestParameters as part of ZhipuAiChatRequestParameters integration
ChatCompletionRequest.doSample changed from String to Boolean type for type safety
ChatCompletionRequest.Builder.from() signature removed due to unuse
ImageRequest and ImageResponse classes annotated with Jackson annotations for serialization compatibility
